intentSynonyms: get a place url in gmaps
look up a place url in gmaps
fetch a single place url in gmaps
view one specific place url in gmaps
generate a shareable place link in gmaps
description: Generate a Google Maps URL for a specific place that can be shared. Does not navigate — just returns the URL. Useful for embedding in messages, documents, or other contexts.

query.description: Place name or address (e.g., "Eiffel Tower", "123 Main St, Springfield, IL")
